role: Copy this file to data/credentials.csv (gitignored) and replace the rows below.
Never hand-write rows: create users with
The password is read via getpass and stored only as pbkdf2_sha256$<iterations>$<salt_hex>$<hash_hex>.
Check a user with: python -m scripts.auth verify --credentials data/credentials.csv --username <u>
role=admin -> scope MUST be empty (unrestricted access).
role=teacher -> scope is ;-separated section labels exactly as scripts.demo_backend.section_of_class emits them (e.g. English.03;English.04). A teacher sees ONLY their sections' students.
role=student -> scope is their student_id and MUST EXACTLY match the embeddings partition id —
the 4-digit roll number from the M4A filename, or for roster-less students the name slug
(name.lower().replace(" ", "_")). A mismatched id logs in fine but retrieval returns nothing.
The example rows below all use the password: change-me-fake-password
